name: core.openwop.ai
description: Spec-canonical AI-call pack. Three foundational nodes (chat-completion, structured-output, embeddings) that route through the host's BYOK aiProviders surface — the pack itself makes no HTTP calls. peerDependencies on `aiProviders.supported`. Side-effectful (declared) so the engine's Layer-2 invocation log caches responses keyed on (runId, nodeId, request-hash) for replay safety.
author: OpenWOP Working Group

nodes.label: Chat Completion
nodes.description: Free-form LLM chat. Returns the model's text response + token usage. Side-effectful + cacheable — replays return the cached node.completed payload via the host's Layer-2 invocation log keyed on (runId, nodeId, request-hash).

nodes.label: Structured Output
nodes.description: LLM call constrained to produce JSON matching a caller-supplied JSON Schema. Implementation routes through the host's provider-specific structured-output mechanism (tool-calling for Anthropic, JSON mode for OpenAI, response_schema for Gemini). Output is the parsed JSON, validated against the schema.

nodes.label: Tool Calling
nodes.description: LLM call with declared tools — model may emit tool_call entries the workflow handles in downstream nodes. Requires the host to advertise `aiProviders.toolCalling` (ctx.callAIWithTools); refuses to register otherwise.

nodes.label: Embeddings
nodes.description: Generates a vector embedding for the input text. Returns the embedding + the dimensionality + the model used. Routes through the host's embeddings provider.
